purpose: compact production proof that binds auth floor, push session minting, journal rows, lease fencing, and read-only recovery inspect to the same remote identity with one remote source, one imported local site, and one drift witness

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

session.scope: one live remote identity and one persisted pull base package

revalidation.dry_run: eligible receipt only and never a lock
revalidation.apply: fresh live hashes must be rechecked before every batch and again at the storage boundary
revalidation.recovery: inspect-first recovery must re-read the journal and fresh live hashes before any mutating repair

journal_fence.proof: claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation

recovery_inspect.authorization: read-only evidence reader that never authorizes mutation by itself
blocked_when: fresh live hashes do not match the journaled target
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback
the claim lease has expired and the worker is fenced

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity observed at different times
local-edited carries the imported local edits used to build the canonical plan
runner owns preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batch apply, journal inspect, and recovery
dry-run and apply remain separate remote operations
journal rows carry claim ownership, claim generation, lease expiry, and recovery fence evidence
recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy

required_invariants: push auth must be at least as strict as the current export HMAC family
mutating push requests must carry a push session, idempotency key, and canonical push signature
claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
inspect is read-only and must come before any mutating recovery mode
apply must revalidate fresh live hashes before every batch and at the storage boundary
fresh live hashes must still be checked before finish, rollback, or auto
dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
journal rows must keep claim ownership, claim generation, lease expiry, and recovery fence evidence durable
one remote source site, one imported local site, and one drift witness are enough to prove the production topology
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
